channel.title: Smith Daily Digest
channel.description: Personalized daily tech & finance audio digest
channel.itunes:author: Audio Digest Bot

item.title: Daily Digest — July 22, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 22, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-22.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-22.txt
Chapters: 0:45 — Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory — An autonomous model allegedly exploits infrastructu 3:14 — The Knowledge Project with Shane Parrish — Changing destructive company defaults 6:54 — Pod Save the World — Ukraine military leadership turmoil and debate over drone w
Sources: - AI Warfare and the Rise of Open Source Models in the US-China Tech Battle (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/7dcbb45f-8cba-41a2-896c-27d214f01c1f.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542 - Truth Over Feelings: Inside Opendoor’s Turnaround (The Knowledge Project with Shane Parrish) Link: https://fs.blog/knowledge-project-podcast/kaz-nejatian/ Source audio: https://pdst.fm/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/traffic.megaphone.fm/FSMI7634016220.mp3 - Pentagon Covers Up Iran War Casualties (Pod Save the World) Link: https://audioboom.com/posts/8930994 Source audio: https://clrtpod.com/m/pscrb.fm/rss/p/prfx.byspotify.com/e/arttrk.com/p/CRMDA/mgln.ai/e/284/dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/audioboom.com/posts/8930994.mp3?modified=1784695407&sid=5166626&source=rss

item.title: Daily Digest — July 21, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 21, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-21.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-21.txt
Chapters: 0:38 — All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg — Why enterprise AI agents remain 4:28 — Invest Like the Best with Patrick O'Shaughnessy — Bottom-up modeling of AI data- 6:59 — The Knowledge Project with Shane Parrish — Changing destructive organizational d
Sources: - Mark Cuban on the AI Bubble: Who Actually Gets Wiped Out? (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/mark-cuban-on-the-ai-bubble-who-actually-gets-wiped-out Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN_MC_RAISE_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - Matthew Smith — Natural Gas: The Next Bottleneck - [Invest Like the Best, EP.483] (Invest Like the Best with Patrick O'Shaughnessy) Link: https://colossus.com/episode/americas-next-energy-crisis/ Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/CLS1352215254.mp3 - Truth Over Feelings: Inside Opendoor’s Massive Turnaround (The Knowledge Project with Shane Parrish) Link: https://fs.blog/knowledge-project-podcast/kaz-nejatian/ Source audio: https://pdst.fm/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/traffic.megaphone.fm/FSMI7634016220.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — July 17, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 17, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-17.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-17.txt
Chapters: 0:43 — Lev Menand and Nathan Tankus on Why Fed Independence Is Now Hanging by a Thread 2:37 — Muddy Waters’ Carson Block on How AI Could Unwind the S&P 500 | #640 5:53 — Amjad Masad on Going Direct, Building Replit, and the Future of Software 10:29 — Amjad Masad on Going Direct, Building Replit, and the Future of Software
Sources: - Lev Menand and Nathan Tankus on Why Fed Independence Is Now Hanging by a Thread (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/lev-menand-and-nathan-tankus-on-why-fed-independence-is-now Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/4e48ebd0-0b41-4721-8e45-b489014fc1c7/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83 - Muddy Waters’ Carson Block on How AI Could Unwind the S&P 500 | #640 (The Meb Faber Show - Better Investing) Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/TIFM3875732261.mp3 - Amjad Masad on Going Direct, Building Replit, and the Future of Software (a16z Podcast) Link: https://a16z.simplecast.com/episodes/amjad-masad-on-going-direct-building-replit-and-the-future-of-software-bWWNM4zx Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/1344/afp-848985-injected.calisto.simplecastaudio.com/3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8/episodes/ab1988f6-4530-47ee-96b0-1256d5af49f6/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8&awEpisodeId=ab1988f6-4530-47ee-96b0-1256d5af49f6&feed=JGE3yC0V

item.title: Daily Digest — July 14, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 14, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-14.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-14.txt
Chapters: 0:52 — The quiet reinvention of a $42b business, with Canva’s Cameron Adams 3:51 — Is AI a Bubble? | Gavin Baker on Data Centers, GPUs, and the AI Economy
Sources: - The quiet reinvention of a $42b business, with Canva’s Cameron Adams (Masters of Scale) Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/tracking.swap.fm/track/7G0M4p2bOLP0mP50O3CD/rss.art19.com/episodes/f9d08bc5-3e5d-476a-ba2f-a046bb0f6fcb.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542 - Is AI a Bubble? | Gavin Baker on Data Centers, GPUs, and the AI Economy (a16z Podcast) Link: https://a16z.simplecast.com/episodes/is-ai-a-bubble-gavin-baker-on-data-centers-gpus-and-the-ai-economy-HMRKhpqK Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/1344/afp-848985-injected.calisto.simplecastaudio.com/3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8/episodes/44297d40-a3b7-4b37-8e5b-3fafa3243a05/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8&awEpisodeId=44297d40-a3b7-4b37-8e5b-3fafa3243a05&feed=JGE3yC0V

item.title: Daily Digest — July 13, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 13, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-13.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-13.txt
Chapters: 1:04 — Apple Just Filed the Lawsuit That Could Destroy OpenAI 4:08 — Why Everyone Is Drowning In Debt (and how to get out) - Caleb Hammer - #1123 7:03 — How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel 9:13 — Jocko Underground: Is It Possible to Get The Actual Truth From Modern Media?
Sources: - Apple Just Filed the Lawsuit That Could Destroy OpenAI (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/ef3c921c-6a03-490b-94d1-8253cebaade8.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542 - Why Everyone Is Drowning In Debt (and how to get out) - Caleb Hammer - #1123 (Modern Wisdom) Source audio: https://prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/claritaspod.com/measure/traffic.megaphone.fm/SIXMSB8612035080.mp3 - How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel (Huberman Lab) Link: https://www.hubermanlab.com/episode/how-to-improve-your-memory-and-cognitive-function-at-any-age-alan-castel Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/SCIM5781519002.mp3 - Jocko Underground: Is It Possible to Get The Actual Truth From Modern Media? (Jocko Podcast) Link: http://jockopodcast.com Source audio: https://audio3.redcircle.com/episodes/1d7dd9c3-c968-460f-9f70-bde877378620/stream.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — July 12, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 12, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-12.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-12.txt
Chapters: 1:04 — Jim Paulsen Sees a Correction Coming | The 33 Charts That Turned Him Cautious 4:19 — Seven allegedly fake Chanel bags vs The RealReal 7:11 — Is California's $750 Million Bet on Hollywood Working?
Sources: - Jim Paulsen Sees a Correction Coming | The 33 Charts That Turned Him Cautious (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/Jim-Paulsen-Sees-a-Correction-Coming--The-33-Charts-That-Turned-Him-Cautious-e3luo8e Source audio: https://anchor.fm/s/9a1dfac/podcast/play/122691278/https%3A%2F%2Fd3ctxlq1ktw2nl.cloudfront.net%2Fstaging%2F2026-6-11%2F427766432-44100-2-d44d96b265539.mp3 - Seven allegedly fake Chanel bags vs The RealReal (Planet Money) Link: https://www.npr.org/2026/07/10/nx-s1-5879253/chanel-realreal-secondhand-luxury-market Source audio: https://tracking.swap.fm/track/XvDEoI11TR00olTUO8US/prfx.byspotify.com/e/play.podtrac.com/npr-510289/npr.simplecastaudio.com/43b5acee-463e-4612-95ad-d2596d9dd337/episodes/a5a22e7a-4cac-46c1-b29b-d5dbebba9027/audio/128/default.mp3?awCollectionId=43b5acee-463e-4612-95ad-d2596d9dd337&awEpisodeId=a5a22e7a-4cac-46c1-b29b-d5dbebba9027&feed=hvWWWzRv&t=podcast&e=nx-s1-5879253&p=510289&d=1538&size=24619555 - Is California's $750 Million Bet on Hollywood Working? (The Town with Matthew Belloni) Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/GLT1223587358.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — July 11, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 11, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-11.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-11.txt
Chapters: 1:02 — More Trillion Dollar IPOs, Anthropic $3T, Zuck's Price War, China Ends Open Sour 2:54 — More Trillion Dollar IPOs, Anthropic $3T, Zuck's Price War, China Ends Open Sour 6:04 — Pioneers of AI: John Deere's AI vision for future farms 8:18 — Is AI The Next Stage Of Human Evolution? - Robert Wright - #1122 11:06 — Is AI The Next Stage Of Human Evolution? - Robert Wright - #1122
Sources: - More Trillion Dollar IPOs, Anthropic $3T, Zuck's Price War, China Ends Open Source?, Trump Accounts (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/more-trillion-dollar-ipos-anthropic-3t-zucks-price-war-china-ends-open-source-trump-accounts Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-E280_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - Pioneers of AI: John Deere's AI vision for future farms (Masters of Scale) Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/tracking.swap.fm/track/7G0M4p2bOLP0mP50O3CD/rss.art19.com/episodes/ee8d34db-4935-462b-a17d-0c5ad7284170.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542 - Is AI The Next Stage Of Human Evolution? - Robert Wright - #1122 (Modern Wisdom) Source audio: https://prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/claritaspod.com/measure/traffic.megaphone.fm/SIXMSB4124462792.mp3
item.itunes:summary:
Daily Digest — July 11, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-11.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-11.txt
Chapters: 1:02 — More Trillion Dollar IPOs, Anthropic $3T, Zuck's Price War, China Ends Open Sour 2:54 — More Trillion Dollar IPOs, Anthropic $3T, Zuck's Price War, China Ends Open Sour 6:04 — Pioneers of AI: John Deere's AI vision for future farms 8:18 — Is AI The Next Stage Of Human Evolution? - Robert Wright - #1122 11:06 — Is AI The Next Stage Of Human Evolution? - Robert Wright - #1122
Sources: - More Trillion Dollar IPOs, Anthropic $3T, Zuck's Price War, China Ends Open Source?, Trump Accounts (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/more-trillion-dollar-ipos-anthropic-3t-zucks-price-war-china-ends-open-source-trump-accounts Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-E280_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - Pioneers of AI: John Deere's AI vision for future farms (Masters of Scale) Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/tracking.swap.fm/track/7G0M4p2bOLP0mP50O3CD/rss.art19.com/episodes/ee8d34db-4935-462b-a17d-0c5ad7284170.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542 - Is AI The Next Stage Of Human Evolution? - Robert Wright - #1122 (Modern Wisdom) Source audio: https://prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/claritaspod.com/measure/traffic.megaphone.fm/SIXMSB4124462792.mp3

Chapters: 1:12 — The $600 Billion Loop | Jeff Klingelhofer on AI, the Return of Bonds and the Fed 3:08 — #484 — Artificial Intimacy 6:13 — We Asked a $1 Billion Quant Manager Why Concentration Isn't a Warning — and Smal
Sources: - The $600 Billion Loop | Jeff Klingelhofer on AI, the Return of Bonds and the Fed's Third Mandate (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/The-600-Billion-Loop--Jeff-Klingelhofer-on-AI--the-Return-of-Bonds-and-the-Feds-Third-Mandate-e3lo1m3 Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO1085977372.mp3 - #484 — Artificial Intimacy (Making Sense with Sam Harris) Link: https://wakingup.libsyn.com/484-artificial-intimacy Source audio: https://traffic.libsyn.com/secure/wakingup/484_MS_Paul_Bloom_paywall.mp3?dest-id=480596 - We Asked a $1 Billion Quant Manager Why Concentration Isn't a Warning — and Small Caps Aren't Dead (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/We-Asked-a-1-Billion-Quant-Manager-Why-Concentration-Isnt-a-Warning--and-Small-Caps-Arent-Dead-e3lpm8a Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO2696800456.mp3

Chapters: 0:58 — Is Software Losing Its Head? 4:02 — Is Software Losing Its Head? 6:50 — Jeremy Giffon - The Billion Dollar PDF - [Invest Like the Best, EP.481] 8:57 — China Is Running The Same Play That Wiped Out The First Wave Of Internet Investo
Sources: - Is Software Losing Its Head? item.title: Daily Digest — July 05, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 05, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-05.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-05.txt
Chapters: 1:03 — Labor Market Cracks, Wild Fed Credibility Data and Semis Running Out of Pie | La 6:24 — Reclaim Kids from Tech with Dr. Lisa Strohman - Episode 2822 9:01 — Are Fitness Trackers Worth It? - Eric Helms & Steve Hall 11:26 — #381 "Don't Open a Jiu Jitsu School Feat. Jared Weiner, Kyle Watson, Nick Sander
Sources: - Labor Market Cracks, Wild Fed Credibility Data and Semis Running Out of Pie | Last Call (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/Labor-Market-Cracks--Wild-Fed-Credibility-Data-and-Semis-Running-Out-of-Pie--Last-Call-e3lk9vh Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO2803240124.mp3 - Reclaim Kids from Tech with Dr. Lisa Strohman - Episode 2822 (Fitness Confidential) Link: https://angriesttrainer.libsyn.com/reclaim-kids-from-tech-with-dr-lisa-strohman-episode-2822 Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/angriesttrainer/1on1DrLisaStrohman-070326-WVF1To.mp3?dest-id=117301 - Are Fitness Trackers Worth It? - Eric Helms & Steve Hall (The Revive Stronger Podcast) Source audio: https://pdst.fm/e/traffic.megaphone.fm/RSL9320624366.mp3 - #381 "Don't Open a Jiu Jitsu School Feat. Jared Weiner, Kyle Watson, Nick Sanders, Junior Silva, and Andrew Sabens (I Suck At Jiu Jitsu Show) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/isuckatjiujitsushow/episodes/381-Dont-Open-a-Jiu-Jitsu-School-Feat--Jared-Weiner--Kyle-Watson--Nick-Sanders--Junior-Silva--and-Andrew-Sabens-e3lifvl Source audio: https://anchor.fm/s/113b3074/podcast/play/122289589/https%3A%2F%2Fd3ctxlq1ktw2nl.cloudfront.net%2Fstaging%2F2026-6-2%2F427226018-44100-2-9360726d155c1.mp3

Jared Weiner, Kyle Watson, Nick Sander
Sources: - Labor Market Cracks, Wild Fed Credibility Data and Semis Running Out of Pie | Last Call (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/Labor-Market-Cracks--Wild-Fed-Credibility-Data-and-Semis-Running-Out-of-Pie--Last-Call-e3lk9vh Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO2803240124.mp3 - Reclaim Kids from Tech with Dr. Lisa Strohman - Episode 2822 (Fitness Confidential) Link: https://angriesttrainer.libsyn.com/reclaim-kids-from-tech-with-dr-lisa-strohman-episode-2822 Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/angriesttrainer/1on1DrLisaStrohman-070326-WVF1To.mp3?dest-id=117301 - Are Fitness Trackers Worth It? - Eric Helms & Steve Hall (The Revive Stronger Podcast) Source audio: https://pdst.fm/e/traffic.megaphone.fm/RSL9320624366.mp3 - #381 "Don't Open a Jiu Jitsu School Feat. Jared Weiner, Kyle Watson, Nick Sanders, Junior Silva, and Andrew Sabens (I Suck At Jiu Jitsu Show) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/isuckatjiujitsushow/episodes/381-Dont-Open-a-Jiu-Jitsu-School-Feat--Jared-Weiner--Kyle-Watson--Nick-Sanders--Junior-Silva--and-Andrew-Sabens-e3lifvl Source audio: https://anchor.fm/s/113b3074/podcast/play/122289589/https%3A%2F%2Fd3ctxlq1ktw2nl.cloudfront.net%2Fstaging%2F2026-6-2%2F427226018-44100-2-9360726d155c1.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — July 04, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 04, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-04.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-04.txt
Chapters: 1:10 — AI Sovereignty Wars, Palantir-Nvidia Deal, SCOTUS Birthright Ruling, Newsom's CA 4:22 — Venture Capital During the AI Revolution with Mamoon Hamid 6:47 — How a Major Grocery Store Chain Can Dramatically Lower the Cost of Food
Sources: - AI Sovereignty Wars, Palantir-Nvidia Deal, SCOTUS Birthright Ruling, Newsom's CA Budget Lie (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/ai-sovereignty-wars-palantir-nvidia-deal-scotus-birthright-ruling-newsoms-ca-budget-lie Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-E279_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - Venture Capital During the AI Revolution with Mamoon Hamid (Masters in Business) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/masters-in-business/venture-capital-during-the-ai-revolution-with-mamoon-hamid Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/4e4cd910-40a1-4619-a5f3-ae2b0012ffff/9b9bd516-49a3-47f7-8ae9-b47b0113c7a7/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=5873a3cb-298f-40bc-b71f-ae2b0013000d - How a Major Grocery Store Chain Can Dramatically Lower the Cost of Food (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/how-a-major-grocery-store-chain-can-dramatically-lower-the-cost-of-food Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/8e5cf07d-8bf4-43a2-9703-b47b014a5166/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83
